name: part_008
file: tmp_【#Myth5years】hololive English -Myth- 5th Anniversary Concert： Fortune Spinner [HT_HUFi8DJ4]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_008.mov

scenes.description: Kiara, Calliope, and Ina'nis perform a cover of 'Otonoke'.
The trio performs their original song 'Fortune Spinner'.
The members talk about their first performance as a trio.

subtitles.original: 誰が開いたかパンドラ
subtitles.english: Who opened Pandora's box?

subtitles.original: あとは何があっても知らんがな
subtitles.english: Whatever happens next, I don't care

subtitles.original: 四時四十四分待ったら
subtitles.english: Waiting for 4:44...

subtitles.original: 六百六十六分様が
subtitles.english: The 666 lord

subtitles.original: 噛まなくちゃ晩御飯
subtitles.english: Has to bite, or no dinner

subtitles.original: 指を食い合したんなら文字通りお疲れ様やん
subtitles.english: If you bite your fingers together, literally good job

subtitles.original: 剥げた剥げた剥げた剥げた剥げた剥げた
subtitles.english: Peeled, peeled, peeled, peeled, peeled, peeled

subtitles.original: 憑きに憑きた先で君が剥げた
subtitles.english: I became possessed, and you peeled away

subtitles.original: タコと坊主が目ぇかみ合ったら
subtitles.english: When the octopus and the monk's eyes meet

subtitles.english: When our eyes cross paths

subtitles.english: Mind, body, and soul start to overflow

subtitles.english: If wings were to grow on my back right now

subtitles.original: 暗闇からさらば
subtitles.english: Farewell to the darkness

subtitles.english: Flying away to the great beyond

subtitles.english: Behind your eyelids, in the darkness
